procedure_name: High Risk Maintenance Chemotherapy for Acute Promyelocytic Leukemia
source_files: PMJAY_STG_Acute Myeloid Leukemia & Acute Promyelocytic Leukemia.pdf
min_doctor_qualification: DM (Medical oncology) or equivalent (MD Medicine with experience/Fellowship in Hematology/Medical Oncology)
clinical_indications: After consolidation therapy, only in high risk patients

clinical_thresholds.note: and patient classified as high risk
for high risk APML according to Sanz's Risk Stratification

preauth.label: FISH/RTPCR or cytogenetics confirmation of PML-RARA or other translocation involving RARA (within first 7 days for preauthorization)
Prior treatment with chemotherapy (if second time): regimen, dates, response (if applicable)

claim.label: Reports of tests supporting diagnosis (pathology, radiology, microbiology, hematology, biochemistry, etc.)
Discharge summary of day care department
All documents as mentioned in preauthorization

ppd_preauth.q: Patient is in high risk category for APML Maintenance?
Consolidation therapy completed for APML High Risk Maintenance?

cpd_claim.q: Same package re-claimed within 6 months for APML High Risk Maintenance?

common_queries: Evidence of high risk status for APML Maintenance not documented (e.g., WBC count > 10 x 10^9/L).
Consolidation therapy not documented as completed prior to APML High Risk Maintenance.
Barcode of administered drugs or diagnosis supporting reports missing at claim stage.
Package re-claimed within 6 months without justification for APML High Risk Maintenance.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Qualified Medical Oncologist/hematologist; Chemotherapy unit (Day care and Ward)
